---
title: "RedeC2"
subtitle: "Permanent plots network for understanding Caatinga and Cerrado dynamics"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
---

<style>
  /* FUNDO FIXO */
  body{
    background-image: url("figures/c2_bg.jpg");
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-size: cover;
    background-attachment: fixed;
    background-position: center top;
  }

  /* Evita “fundo” do container principal escondendo o background */
  main.content{
    background: transparent;
    padding-top: 2.5rem;
    padding-bottom: 3rem;
  }

  /* CARTÃO: largura de tela (via column-screen), opaco */
  .content-card{
    width: 100%;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 2rem 2.25rem;

    background: #ffffff; /* opaco: fundo só aparece nas janelas */
    border-radius: 18px;
    box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
  }

  /* Conteúdo interno com largura confortável */
  .content-card .inner{
    max-width: 1100px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* JANELA: faixa transparente entre cartões */
  .bg-window{
    width: 100%;
    height: 5.5rem;
  }

  /* Títulos */
  .content-card h2{
    margin-top: 0;
  }

  /* Responsivo */
  @media (max-width: 992px){
    .content-card{ padding: 1.4rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 14px; }
    .bg-window{ height: 3.5rem; }
  }
  
/* Centraliza título e subtítulo */
.quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner,
.quarto-title-block .quarto-title{
  text-align: center;
}
/* Retângulo flutuante APENAS ao redor do título/subtítulo */
.quarto-title-block .quarto-title{
  display: inline-block;              /* não ocupa a largura toda */
  text-align: center;
  padding: 1.0rem 1.0rem;
  margin: 1.0rem 0 1.0rem 0;

  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18);    /* preto com opacidade */
  border-radius: 18px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(6px);

  max-width: min(1100px, 92vw);       /* limita e respeita mobile */
}

/* Título em terracota */
.quarto-title-block .title{
  color: #B8860B;   
  font-weight: 2000;
}

/* Subtítulo: branco e negrito */
.quarto-title-block .subtitle{
  color: #F0E68C;
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* Opcional: melhora a leitura do subtítulo sobre o background */
.quarto-title-block{
  text-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
}

</style>

::: {.column-screen}
::: {.content-card}
::: {.inner}
## Overview

RedeC2 is a research network dedicated to the long-term monitoring of Brazilian dry ecosystems...
:::
:::
:::

::: {.column-screen}
::: {.bg-window}
:::
:::

::: {.column-screen}
::: {.content-card}
::: {.inner}
## What we do

RedeC2 integrates forest inventories, phenology, functional traits, and biomass data...
- Installing and maintaining permanent plots...
- Long-term monitoring...
:::
:::
:::

::: {.column-screen}
::: {.bg-window}
:::
:::

::: {.column-screen}
::: {.content-card}
::: {.inner}
## Contribute

You can contribute to RedeC2 by:
- Opening issues...
- Submitting pull requests...
- Suggesting or developing new features (please open an issue for discussion first)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.column-screen}
::: {.bg-window}
:::
:::

::: {.column-screen}
::: {.content-card}
::: {.inner}
## Acknowledgements

RedeC2 is supported by national and international collaborations...
Early partners included [**SECO**](https://blogs.ed.ac.uk/seco-project/network-connections/), [**ForestPlots.net**](https://forestplots.net/).
:::
:::
:::
